title: Paw Patrol, 10th Anniversary, All Paws On Deck Toy Figures Gift Pack with 10 Collectible Action Figures, Kids' Toys for Ages 3 and up
features: 10 PAW PATROL ACTION FIGURES: This gift set is a must-have for PAW Patrol fans. With all 10 pups included, it’s the perfect way to bring home the action and excitement of the PAW Patrol series
AUTHENTIC SERIES UNIFORMS: Each pup is wearing their signature uniforms, and feature realistic fur details, which brings each of your favourite PAW Patrol pups to life
IMAGINATIVE PLAY: Explore your imagination to relive your favourite moments from the PAW Patrol series, or create all-new rescue adventures, with the “All Paws On Deck” Toy Figures Gift Pack
COLLECT THEM ALL: For more fun, collect all of the PAW Patrol toys like the Aqua Pups kids’ toys, PAW Patrol movie toys, dragon toys, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets (each sold separately)

LEARNING AND EDUCATION TOYS: PAW plush toys and toy cars are perfect for boys and girls who enjoy building toys. Great gifts for kids aged 3 and up as an alternative to dolls, dinosaur toys or train sets
description: From the manufacturer PAW Patrol, 10th Anniversary, All Paws On Deck Toy Figures Gift Pack with 10 Collectible Action Figures, Kids' Toys for Ages 3 and up Create your own super-charged PAW Patrol adventures with the “All Paws On Deck” Toy Figures Gift Pack. This PAW Patrol figures set includes Chase, Marshall, Rocky, Rubble, Zuma, Skye, Everest, Tracker, Rex and Liberty. The “All Paws On Deck” Gift Pack is the largest PAW Patrol figures gift pack yet, making it the perfect way to collect all of your favourite pups at the same time. Each pup is wearing their signature uniforms and feature true-to-show details on each figure. These heroic pups are ready to save the day, so relive your favourite scenes from the show or create entirely new adventures with all of the PAW Patrol pups. For even more exciting film-inspired missions, play with your new PAW Patrol figurines with the PAW Patrol Lookout Tower (sold separately). With PAW Patrol toys, kids can explore their imaginations and develop their motor skills, through pretend play. 10 PAW PATROL ACTION FIGURES This gift set is a must-have for PAW Patrol fans. With all 10 pups included, it’s the perfect way to bring home the action and excitement of the PAW Patrol series AUTHENTIC SERIES UNIFORMS Each pup is wearing their signature uniforms, and feature realistic fur details, which brings each of your favourite PAW Patrol pups to life IMAGINATIVE PLAY Explore your imagination to relive your favourite moments from the PAW Patrol series, or create all-new rescue adventures, with the “All Paws On Deck” Toy Figures Gift Pack COLLECT THEM ALL For more fun, collect all of the PAW Patrol toys like the Aqua Pups kids’ toys, PAW Patrol movie toys, dragon toys, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets (each sold separately).
